Overview

About the simulation.

Aftermath is a multiplayer business simulation built for corporate education. Participants are immersed in a post-crisis world where survival hinges on critical business decisions made under resource constraints — sharpening decision-making, strategic thinking and resource management across teams and markets.

Five competing market sectors — Construction, Food, Health, Education & Clothes.
Who benefits

Built for the people who carry the decisions.

Business decision-makers

Leaders making high-stakes calls under uncertainty.

Senior sales staff

Professionals managing high-stakes portfolios and markets.

Cross-functional teams

Groups building strategic alignment and resilience.

Impact

Competencies developed.

01

Strategic Thinking

Analyze market dynamics, anticipate trends, and position for long-term success.

02

Decision-Making

Weigh options under pressure and make informed, profitable choices.

03

Resource Management

Optimize limited resources for maximum impact.

04

Customer Focus

Identify and address customer priorities to drive loyalty.

05

Team Collaboration

Foster cooperation and alignment within diverse groups.

06

Adaptability

Navigate uncertainty and shift strategy as conditions change.

Learning outcomes

By the end, participants will…

  • ✓Master effective decision-making in high-pressure situations.
  • ✓Build customer-centric strategies that meet real market demand.
  • ✓Balance short-term gains against long-term goals.
  • ✓Enhance team collaboration and cross-functional alignment.
